datasets.name: 506a0922
queryLines:
select * /*Single denormalized/flattened/wide table that contains data from patients master, drug fact, drug dimension*/
from 
catalog1_we47.gold_layer.patients fact_patients
inner join
catalog1_we47.gold_layer.drugs dim_drug
on fact_patients.drugid = dim_drug.uniqueid

datasets.name: 4de3720f
queryLines:
select Married,SeniorCitizen,sum(DrugCharges) as TotalDrugCharges, count(DrugCharges) as NoOfDrugs
from 
catalog1_we47.gold_layer.patients fact_patients
inner join
catalog1_we47.gold_layer.drugs dim_drug
on fact_patients.drugid = dim_drug.uniqueid
group by 1,2
order by TotalDrugCharges desc

datasets.name: 1a46bcf8
queryLines:
select distinct geodim.country,staff.shipment_id,staff.staff_full_name,staff.hub_location,cast(staff.latitude as double) as latitude,cast(staff.longitude as double) as  longitude
from workspace.default.gold_staff_geo_enriched_dlt2 staff 
inner join workspace.default.bronze_geotag_data1 geodim
on staff.hub_location = geodim.city_name;

frame.title: Comparison of Useful count of the Drugs for different medical conditions
Rating wise Distribution/Proposion of Useful count of the Drugs
Trend Analysis of the Average Rating and Sum of Useful Count over the Years
Trend & Comparison of Monthly Avg Useful count and Avg Rating
Volume(Area) of UsefulCount occupied over the Rating
Histogram (Compare & Trend) of the useful count across different dates
Comparing the metrics of Percentile, Mean, Max and Minumum (Box) of Ratings
Heat Map (Color variation) to identify the volume of activity happened (Used for monitoring CPU usage)
Waterfall of the Sum of useful count across ratings
Detailed Summary(optional) view of the rating, rating percentage, drugname etc.,
Pivot Table for detailed view of data at drugs and year (column) level - It help us restrict the traversing of huge number of data, since it is pivoting rows to columns
Sankey Chart for finding the Connection or Relationship metrics or Propogation/Dependency metrics - Eg. Website Clickstream Analysis
Scattered Chart for finding the Dimension wise metrics (in a scattered data points) - If connect these points and fill the area, then it will become line chart and area chart respectively.
Stacked (Bar Chart) - to identify Payment method wise Average Rating & senior citized dataset.

lines: **Geographical View of Drivers in Different Geo Locations & Geo Points**
